examples: A spokesman dismissed any suggestion of a boardroom rift.
To get an idea of the culture we're talking about, consider the boardroom Grune opened up.
The receptionist led the way to the boardroom.
Reports have cited boardroom disagreements over whether ITV should sell or stay independent as the cause.
The 57-year-old director added that despite rumours of unrest in the boardroom, he is there to stay.
